featureDetection.rationale: Queries natively for the existence of Uint8Array.prototype.toBase64, toggleable options, and updates support indicator badges appropriately.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Includes a robust polyfill fallback utilizing window.btoa and text-encoders, ensuring the playground remains fully functional on legacy engines.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Excellent interface with full dropdown customization (alphabet, omitPadding, lastChunkHandling) and live round-trip text matching updates.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Excellent and thorough interactive lab exploring Uint8Array base64 and hex standards.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Follows style guidelines perfectly with high contrast styling rules.
